'''âth-p-n-d''' ('''kathapnedoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:experiment|experiment]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-p-n-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:experiment|experiment]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âth-p-n-d
|-
! Lemma
| kathapnedoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithapnedoko|thithapnedoko]] || [[word:jithapnedoko|jithapnedoko]] || [[word:shithapnedoko|shithapnedoko]] || [[word:kithapnedoko|kithapnedoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthapnedoko|thuthuthapnedoko]] || [[word:jujuthapnedoko|jujuthapnedoko]] || [[word:shushuthapnedoko|shushuthapnedoko]] || [[word:kukuthapnedoko|kukuthapnedoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuthapnedoko|thuthapnedoko]] || [[word:juthapnedoko|juthapnedoko]] || [[word:shuthapnedoko|shuthapnedoko]] || [[word:kuthapnedoko|kuthapnedoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuthapnedoko|thuthapnedoko]] || [[word:juthapnedoko|juthapnedoko]] || [[word:shuthapnedoko|shuthapnedoko]] || [[word:kuthapnedoko|kuthapnedoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thethapnedoko|thethapnedoko]] || [[word:jethapnedoko|jethapnedoko]] || [[word:shethapnedoko|shethapnedoko]] || [[word:kethapnedoko|kethapnedoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothapnedoko|thothapnedoko]] || [[word:jothapnedoko|jothapnedoko]] || [[word:shothapnedoko|shothapnedoko]] || [[word:kothapnedoko|kothapnedoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothapnedoko|thothapnedoko]] || [[word:jothapnedoko|jothapnedoko]] || [[word:shothapnedoko|shothapnedoko]] || [[word:kothapnedoko|kothapnedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠthapnedoko|thĂŠthapnedoko]] || [[word:jĂŠthapnedoko|jĂŠthapnedoko]] || [[word:shĂŠthapnedoko|shĂŠthapnedoko]] || [[word:kĂŠthapnedoko|kĂŠthapnedoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathapnedoko|thathapnedoko]] || [[word:jathapnedoko|jathapnedoko]] || [[word:shathapnedoko|shathapnedoko]] || [[word:kathapnedoko|kathapnedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathapnedoko|thathapnedoko]] || [[word:jathapnedoko|jathapnedoko]] || [[word:shathapnedoko|shathapnedoko]] || [[word:kathapnedoko|kathapnedoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
